section.container: relative py-24 px-4 overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-[#f0f9ff]

backgroundElements.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-cyan-500/5 to-teal-500/5 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
backgroundElements.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-teal-500/5 to-cyan-500/5 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob

imageSection.background: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500/10 to-teal-500/10 rounded-3xl blur-2xl transform rotate-3

decorativeElement.container: absolute -top-4 -right-4 w-24 h-24 bg-blue-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center

textContent.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-cyan-600 border border-blue-100
textContent.title: text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 leading-tight mb-6

statCard.container: group bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
statCard.value: text-4xl font-bold text-cyan-600 mb-2 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform
statCard.label: text-gray-600 font-medium

gridPattern.backgroundImage: linear-gradient(to right, #e6f3ff 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #e6f3ff 1px, transparent 1px)
